name: Hospital Bulk Medical Gas Inventory
description: EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 is open. You must create a new facility named 'St. Luke's Regional Medical Center' (or open an existing one if provided) and add two bulk medical gases to its inventory. Add Oxygen (CAS: 7782-44-7) with a Max Daily Amount of 102,500 lbs, Avg Daily Amount of 85,000 lbs, stored 365 days. Mark hazards as Oxidizer and Gas under pressure. Storage is an Above ground tank, Greater than ambient pressure, Cryogenic conditions at 'North Courtyard Bulk Pad'. Next, add Nitrous Oxide (CAS: 10024-97-2) with Max 12,500 lbs, Avg 8,000 lbs, 365 days. Mark hazards as Oxidizer, Gas under pressure, and Specific target organ toxicity. Storage is Cylinder, Greater than ambient pressure, Ambient temperature at 'Main Hospital Cylinder Storage Room B-12'. Save and export the submission to C:\workspace\data\st_lukes_final.t2s.
